Skip to contents
space4time 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • covariates
    • Example using PTAGIS queries
    • Introduction to fitting age-specific space-for-time mark-recapture models

Model predictions from fitted fit_ageclass objects

Source: R/predict.R
predict.s4t_ageclass_model.Rd

Model predictions from fitted fit_ageclass objects.

Usage

# S3 method for class 's4t_ageclass_model'
predict(object, newdata, type = c("prob", "class", "cum.prob"), ...)

Arguments

object

a s4t_ageclass_model object

newdata

A data frame object in the same format as aux_age_df (see documentation for s4t_ch) containing data to predict age-class. If omitted, the fitted values for the aux_age_df data in the s4t_ch from the fitted model object are returned.

type

The prediction type. A character of one of the three option prob, class, or cum.prob.

...

not used (needed for generic consistency)

Value

Depends on the type. type = "prob" returns a matrix of the probabilities, type = "class" returns a vector of the mostly likely age-class (highest probability), type = "cum.prob" returns the cumulative probabilities as a matrix (probability that the individual is at least a particular age-class).

Examples

sim.dat <- sim_simple_s4t_ch(N = 2000)
m1 <- fit_ageclass(age_formula = ~ FL,
                   s4t_ch = sim.dat$s4t_ch)
predict(m1,type = "prob")
#>                 Age1       Age2         Age3
#>    [1,] 0.0006633707 0.03347510 0.9658615264
#>    [2,] 0.0065094031 0.25212865 0.7413619475
#>    [3,] 0.1218248156 0.75893608 0.1192391021
#>    [4,] 0.0007297230 0.03669798 0.9625723009
#>    [5,] 0.9560936488 0.04304463 0.0008617232
#>    [6,] 0.6881019791 0.30345703 0.0084409951
#>    [7,] 0.6010090895 0.38667643 0.0123144757
#>    [8,] 0.0865227271 0.74800552 0.1654717513
#>    [9,] 0.9722879205 0.02717708 0.0005350041
#>   [10,] 0.0022890024 0.10657185 0.8911391452
#>   [11,] 0.6236497672 0.36514367 0.0112065588
#>   [12,] 0.3240773045 0.63822831 0.0376943886
#>   [13,] 0.4125321738 0.56141955 0.0260482749

#>   [15,] 0.1826828923 0.73980515 0.0775119616
#>   [16,] 0.1324044166 0.75801699 0.1095785945
#>   [17,] 0.0865227271 0.74800552 0.1654717513
